decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops targeted amplicon sequencing and operationally combines it with wastewater surveillance to provide early warning of SARS-CoV-2 variant incursion and spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete operational application detected the first known Omicron BA.1 incursion into Victoria.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts wastewater-based epidemiology surveillance and demonstrates a two-week lead over increasing community COVID-19 cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete SARS-CoV-2 surveillance application in three Indonesian districts served as an early warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a landscape-and-flux framework to identify time-irreversibility-based early warning indicators for critical infectious-disease transitions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological study presents a practical approach for predicting critical-transition onset.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, validates, and field-demonstrates a portable LAMP workstation described as an early warning system for rapid STEC detection in water.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides and validates an operational portable diagnostic implementation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews current infectious-disease early warning systems and identifies integration, standardization, surveillance, and predictive-modeling needs.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit review and forward-looking guidance for developing an integrated China–Australia early warning network.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the Ningbo dengue surveillance and early warning system's timeliness, effectiveness, and operational limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance and limitation assessment of a deployed dengue early warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an algorithmic regional occurrence-warning tool that generates site-specific, near-real-time PRRS alerts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development paper describing the warning algorithm, reporting process, and operational use.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews AI-based epidemic early warning systems, their effectiveness, and limitations involving bias, data quality, explainability, and generalizability.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused scoping review supplies improvement strategies and future-development guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests correlations and lead–lag relationships between wastewater signals and confirmed long-term-care COVID-19 outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Directly evaluates wastewater surveillance's early-warning performance across 53 confirmed outbreaks.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies diarrheal and cholera surveillance integrated with an early warning, alert, and response system in Rohingya health facilities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete six-year cholera-surveillance application linked warnings with outbreak prevention measures.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Baidu Search Index data with negative-binomial models to predict COVID-19 trends several days ahead of conventional surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 application evaluates internet-search data as an early-warning supplement.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses rodent abundance, rainfall, and dynamic regression to anticipate a hantavirus pulmonary syndrome outbreak by three months.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPS application demonstrates outbreak anticipation using climate and rodent surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews avian-influenza early warning systems and examines how data, mathematical models, and AI could improve forecasting and hotspot detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Review-based methodological guidance on integrating models and data into early warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes and applies a multipoint infectious-disease monitoring, warning, and response system using health data, AI, and blockchain.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit system-development paper describes warning methods and application effectiveness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Maps climate-driven early warning forecasting systems and identifies limited operationalization, disease coverage, access, and geographic gaps.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Scoping review provides priorities for developing and implementing climate-driven warning tools.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The report only records national availability of health early warning systems among many climate-health indicators; it does not develop, apply, evaluate, or directly critique the method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Incidental indicator reporting is not a lineage lead for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Scoping review evaluates respiratory-infection early warning systems and identifies generalizability, bias, validation, and methodological limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evidence synthesis offers standardization and development guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Comprehensively reviews infectious-disease early warning systems, contrasting data sources and identifying drawbacks of existing approaches.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused review supplies recommendations for future system integration and development.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs and applies a three-stage dengue warning model combining source, symptom, and epidemic warnings.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a staged early warning design.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews quantitative approaches relevant to dengue early warning systems and documents major validation and reporting gaps.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Methodological synthesis provides directions for future warning-system development.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a selective-pressure metric derived from viral frequency dynamics as an early signal of epidemic growth.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly develops a mechanistic framework and new early-signal metric.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews outbreak events to argue that event-based surveillance should support more granular, multiple-point triggers beyond initial early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides explicit recommendations for expanding early-warning surveillance practice.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies EARS and EVI thresholds and compares their early-alarm rates and true positivity against respiratory hospitalization anomalies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative performance evaluation of early-warning algorithms.

decisions.relationship_evidence: This is an individual-patient pneumonia risk model and nursing intervention study, not an epidemiological early-warning signal or outbreak-warning method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Clinical deterioration prevention is not a lineage lead for the assigned epidemiological concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically maps national antimicrobial-resistance early warning systems and identifies sparse availability, heterogeneous definitions, and limited assessment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused review recommends standardization, broader implementation, and further evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews global infectious-disease early warning models, their algorithms, application status, and development prospects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit updated methodological review intended to inform future early-warning research.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates Syrian EWARS and EWARN functionality and compares disease-specific alert-threshold methods using sensitivity and specificity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct system and threshold performance assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Designs and deploys a multistream deep-learning framework for respiratory-disease surveillance, forecasting, and early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit framework-development study with comparative predictive evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a computational framework for designing and estimating the early-warning effectiveness of global aircraft wastewater networks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit analytic framework for optimizing sentinel networks and detection time.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes Lombardy's threshold-based alert system and assesses its response organization and effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of a regional monitoring and warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the EPIWATCH open-source-intelligence warning system to analyze 310 outbreaks and determine when signals preceded official sources or diagnosis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multi-outbreak application of OSINT-based early warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Documents a real respiratory outbreak in which community event-based surveillance generated an early signal missed by other surveillance systems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Kenyan outbreak application triggered investigation and response.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces and evaluates an ensemble climate, epidemiological, and field-data forecasting tool for municipal West Nile virus risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a seasonally updated early-warning modeling system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Shows that Mycobacterium ulcerans DNA in possum feces preceded human Buruli ulcer cases by up to 39 months.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete emergence study identifies an environmental signal preceding human disease.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews integrated emerging-disease warning systems in China, identifies gaps, and recommends One Health improvements.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit review and optimization guidance for community-level early warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests Baidu and WeChat search indices against mpox case trends to assess their potential early-warning role.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct empirical assessment of digital-data warning capability and lagged correlations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces and validates VirusWarn, a Nextflow system that detects, prioritizes, and reports concerning respiratory-virus variants.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides an implemented, adaptable genomic-surveillance warning system with reports and visualizations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The study benchmarks national Aedes-borne disease surveillance and response structures; early warning appears only as a possible preparedness benefit, not a method actually developed or evaluated.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The abstract does not establish the record as a lineage source for the exact early-warning concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Designs and validates a syndromic surveillance warning system using mortality alarms and predictive models for salmon pancreas disease outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit system-development and validation study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and evaluates an interpretable tree-based machine-learning framework for dengue outbreak warning in Bangladesh.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a dengue early warning model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes development and deployment of a scalable airport-based pathogen genomic monitoring and early-warning program.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete deployed early-warning implementation at US international airports.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Scoping review examines malaria early warning systems' methods, performance, actions, evaluation, and implementation limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological review recommends refinement, standardization, and workflow integration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a practical method for evaluating machine-learning anomaly detectors against an ensemble-derived reference standard for epidemic warnings.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit validation methodology and benchmark across four pathogen series.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Documents implementation of event-based early warning, alert, and response interventions during Tanzania's Marburg outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete outbreak-response implementation using electronic signal reporting and verification.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests wastewater Bordetella pertussis signals against clinical surveillance and finds peaks ten days earlier.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct empirical evaluation of wastewater surveillance's early-detection capability.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether rolling hygiene non-compliance measures and thresholds predict multidrug-resistant bacterial outbreaks in a burn unit.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of candidate warning metrics against two observed outbreaks.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews AI warning applications and directly identifies data, transparency, integration, privacy, and equity limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused evidence synthesis provides requirements for reliable and ethical implementation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates how time and state political leaning affect the advance-warning capability of different geo-social-media topics for COVID-19.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct empirical assessment of signal performance 7–42 days ahead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies EARS algorithms to Brazilian primary-care data and measures warning timeliness, sensitivity, and predictive value against dengue thresholds.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Nationwide direct performance evaluation of a dengue early warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Scoping review maps digital early-warning methods, performance metrics, validation, limitations, and demographic biases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological review recommends reporting, bias-mitigation, and signal-quality improvements.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a hybrid dengue early-warning architecture combining retrospective data with selected real-time climate and digital signals.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit architecture-development study with case-study simulations and performance estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a probability-based Dense ResNet warning model that replaces binary alerts with continuous influenza risk estimates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit novel model-development and comparative evaluation study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an integrated, adaptable large-language-model framework for epidemic intelligence and early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit conceptual and methodological framework for a new warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs a BiLSTM-BiGRU forecasting model and moving-percentile control-chart warning model for infectious gastroenteritis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and comparative evaluation of an epidemiological warning approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews respiratory-disease surveillance data and warning indicators, emphasizing their heterogeneous applicability and efficacy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological synthesis intended to guide warning-system construction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates piggery-effluent and environmental-water surveillance as a complementary source of early JEV detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Empirical feasibility assessment of effluent signals for warning-system integration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and applies eVarEPS to identify and risk-rank SARS-CoV-2 mutations in sewage before population detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides a database and freely accessible online early-warning tool.

decisions.relationship_evidence: States that no effective, feasible pre-outbreak warning method is validated and proposes principles and pilots for post-outbreak warning and response.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit theoretical and practical guidance for warning-strategy development.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates active school screening as an early-warning method for identifying asymptomatic SARS-CoV-2 infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct controlled assessment of an early-identification approach in Italian schools.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The review addresses broad outbreak-detection capacity under the 7-1-7 framework; AI warning systems are only one suggested solution and are not directly developed, applied, or evaluated.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The exact early-warning concept is incidental to broader health-security guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, tests, interprets, and publicly releases a LightGBM implementation for avian-influenza outbreak warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The primary implementation is explicitly made available as code.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies lagged climate–cholera analyses to identify district-specific thresholds and indicators for cholera warning in Ethiopia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cholera application across 13 districts informs a climate-supported warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and prospectively applies regression-based dengue epidemic alert thresholds using routine Puerto Rican surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and real-time application of a warning method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews climate-informed vector-borne-disease warning systems and identifies data, infrastructure, stakeholder, and communication limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit recommendations for developing and operationalizing sustainable warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and benchmarks a deployable infectious-disease warning framework based on pretrained large time-series models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological framework development with comparative performance testing.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates five years of EWARS reporting timeliness, completeness, alert verification, and response activity in Borno State.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct longitudinal performance assessment of an operational warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and prospectively evaluates machine-learning models that use earlier variant data to identify counties at risk from future SARS-CoV-2 variants.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit predictive-model development for early pandemic decision support.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces FluWarning, an anomaly-detection method using codon bias and dinucleotide composition to flag influenza spillovers.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit new computational warning method tested against pandemic and H5N1 emergence.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Pilots the WHO-developed EWARS Mobile for offline priority-disease and event-based reporting in conflict-affected Darfur.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete mobile-system pilot demonstrates feasibility, utility, and subsequent expansion.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an Isolation Forest framework to detect anomalous environmental profiles associated with potential antimicrobial-resistance risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit data-driven methodological framework intended to enable AMR warning strategies.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies EPIWATCH open-source-intelligence signals to analyze infectious-disease patterns before, during, and after major Australian floods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete weather-associated infectious-disease signal application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, field-validates, and deploys a web-based machine-learning warning platform for cryptocaryoniasis outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Open-source platform delivers weekly spatial outbreak forecasts in operational aquaculture settings.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and benchmarks a mobility-enhanced LSTM framework for dengue forecasting and outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development intended to enhance dengue warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes a temperature–humidity warning model that predicts hand-foot-and-mouth disease and viral-diarrhea outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a novel meteorological early-warning framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews AI applications, advantages, and challenges in infectious-disease surveillance and warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit review intended to guide more effective warning-system construction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Scoping review assesses wastewater and environmental surveillance for mpox warnings, including early detections, negative associations, and false results.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Evidence synthesis identifies performance limitations and research needs.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an integrated multilevel Bayesian model linking climate, bird irruptions, and salmonellosis to forecast future outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit predictive-method development demonstrated as an epidemic warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies Bayesian structural time-series and SARIMAX models with Baidu Index data to forecast hepatitis B incidence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hepatitis B application supports incorporating search data into warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Narrative review compares dengue warning systems, lead times, data integration, and implementation and replicability gaps.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological synthesis of forecasting and warning approaches.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a rapid review and SWOT analysis to assess the Canadian animal-health surveillance system's strengths and limitations as an early-warning component.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment generates recommendations for strengthening animal-health early warning.
named_source_mentions: Strategic Framework for Early Warning Systems in Animal Health

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates wastewater norovirus and rotavirus signals against clinical peaks and quantifies their lead times and statistical significance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct early-warning performance assessment identifies a significant one-month NoV GII lead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Generates probabilistic ensemble dengue forecasts that were adopted by Brazilian authorities for epidemic planning and response.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete operational application of forecasts within dengue preparedness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an ensemble-labeling method expressly for evaluating outbreak early warning systems when ground-truth labels are unavailable.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation methodology benchmarked against traditional outbreak-detection algorithms.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses citizen-reported tick observations to predict Lyme borreliosis case peaks three to four weeks later.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Finnish application demonstrates advance warning from crowdsourced vector observations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The historical surveillance review only recommends establishing a future risk-warning model; it does not itself develop, apply, evaluate, or directly critique one.
decisions.lineage_evidence: A future recommendation alone is not a lineage lead for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies validated spatiotemporal models to forecast Anopheles peaks preceding a reported malaria surge.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Tanzanian malaria-risk application demonstrates a proxy warning signal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates routine mortality data and excess-mortality thresholds as an advance indicator of respiratory outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct feasibility assessment against COVID-19 pandemic peaks.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a coupled MaxEnt–SARIMA approach providing spatial risk classes and differentiated brucellosis warning schedules.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of spatiotemporal warning schemes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an integrated explainable-AI and Bayesian district-level dengue warning system for Bangladesh.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit system-development study with predictive-performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and tests a dual-branch wastewater model that forecasts COVID-19 trajectories and triggers tiered alerts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit novel warning-framework development with baseline, ablation, and external testing.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and evaluates a quantile-regression-forest warning framework integrating food contamination and human surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for uncertainty-aware Salmonella risk warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and pilots an open-source hybrid modeling system producing calibrated multisource infectious-disease alerts and dashboards.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Implemented system was deployed for COVID-19 and SFTSV and generated operational warnings.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses correlation and change-point analyses to test wastewater lead time and finds no reliable early warning during Bengaluru's Omicron wave.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct null evaluation of early-warning performance, preserving the method's observed limitation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Qualitatively examines clinician and researcher experiences, desired attributes, and implementation and evaluation challenges for respiratory-infection warning systems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit stakeholder-informed guidance for system co-design and operational integration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The model predicts severe symptom progression within already diagnosed individual patients, not epidemiological emergence or outbreak-warning signals.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Clinical severity prediction is not a lineage lead for the assigned epidemiological concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses whether dengue risk thresholds produced timely emergency declarations and finds the warning framework insufficiently responsive.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of warning-to-governance responsiveness during Brazil's 2024 epidemic.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops integrated One Health spatial and spatiotemporal models that estimate West Nile virus exposure risk up to one year ahead.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit predictive-framework development with prospective early-warning potential.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the deployed surveillance and warning software's effect on infectious-disease reporting sensitivity using counterfactual prediction models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct empirical assessment finds disease-specific improvements and a null effect for dysentery.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a prospectively deployed transfer-learning system that detects respiratory-outbreak onsets and peaks across all US states.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational real-time deployment reports lead times, detection rates, and predictive values.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates wastewater SARS-CoV-2 concentrations against reported cases and identifies a significant ten-day lead for the N gene.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of wastewater surveillance's early-warning value.
